title: swertia piloglandulosa
intro: Swertia piloglandulosa, also known as the Himalayan swertia or Tibetan gentian, is a plant species within the Gentianaceae family, native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Swertia piloglandulosa include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Swertia piloglandulosa is traditionally prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
